title: [False Positive] Continuous moved incorrectly flags immediately upon lying down on a bed
author: JinoStk123
body:
## Video description

Detailed logs and movement values are shown directly in the in-game chat overlay.
Video URL: https://youtu.be/KxVLvPDuXCI

## Description of the bug

[False Positive] Continuous moved incorrectly flags immediately upon lying down on a bed.

When a player right-clicks to sleep/lie down on a bed, Intave immediately triggers a moved incorrectly violation. The anti-cheat continuously flags the player the exact moment the lying down animation starts, causing a heavy rubberband loop.

As demonstrated in the video, the violation counter spikes aggressively (climbing rapidly through 238.75, 258.75, 271.13+) every single time the player interacts with the bed to lie down, completely glitching the player's positioning while they are just trying to use the bed normally.

## Environmental Information
```
26.1.1@775,Paper@26.1.2-72-1a6b910 (MC: 26.1.2),5.5.0-SNAPSHOT-7482342,14.9.4-d78f4a2e
```

title: [False Positive] Passing through doors triggers continuous moved incorrectly flags
author: JinoStk123
body:
## Video description

Detailed logs and movement values are shown directly in the in-game chat overlay via the attached file bug report.mp4. [VIDEO](https://youtu.be/e4xxlcJ9KnI)

## Description of the bug

[False Positive] Continuous moved incorrectly flags when interacting/moving through doors.

While playing on Minecraft, moving through or squeezing past the hitboxes of a wooden door triggers constant moved incorrectly violations from Intave. The anti-cheat heavily rubberbands the player back, causing a massive spike in the internal violation counter from +10.00 straight up to 360.15+. This completely traps the player in a rubberband loop until they move completely away from the door block.

Environmental Information
```
26.1.1@775,Paper@26.1.2-72-1a6b910 (MC: 26.1.2),5.5.0-SNAPSHOT-7482342,14.9.4-d78f4a2e
```

title: sheep push flag
author: JinoStk123
body: sheep push me in minecraft 26.1.2 and cause flag (100+ms ping)

title: Eating is sometimes cancelled while inside cobwebs without any verbose flags
author: TheoNX
body:
Video:
https://medal.tv/games/minecraft/clips/n1SrbMUsqjQuuf5_J?invite=cr-MSxvd2wsMTkyNjAzODQ5

As shown in the video, the player attempts to eat a golden apple, but the eating action is unexpectedly cancelled.

This seems to happen occasionally when the player is inside a cobweb. The issue is inconsistent, and I haven't found a reliable way to reproduce ir. It appears to occur randomly.

I also noticed that no verbose output is generated when the cancellation occurs. I have already tried setting the verbose mode to all, but it still doesn't produce any flags or logs.

The issue also affects players with the bypass trust factor enabled.

Expected behavior: The player should be able to eat normally while inside a cobweb unless there is actually a reason for the action to be cancelled.

At the moment, I haven't found a consistent way to reproduce the issue. It just seems to happen randomly during gameplay.

**Environmental Information**
Environment: `1.21.11@769`,`Paper@1.21.11-132-c5eb079 (MC: 1.21.11)`,`5.5.0-SNAPSHOT`,`dev-snapshot-e0a0434`

title: please add a multiactions-like check
author: trollfacenan
body: Grim has a check called MultiActions and it prevents cheaters from doing something (such as eating) and hitting at the same time, however cheaters can do that on Intave. It also uses input packets to check for InventoryMove (not sure if Intave does that but if it doesn't then adding it would be nice)

title: 26.2 support
author: lokspel

title: False physics positives with player movement attributes
author: KamikotoTkach

title: Intave errors when a player renders a Phoenix Crates
author: Chamogelastos
body:
**Video description**
https://youtu.be/gu9Y9Oou7Gw

**Description of the bug**
When I render a Phoenix Crate, it produces:
```LOG
[19:19:23 INFO]: Intave| ERROR: Vehicle entity not found in mount request: 41
[19:19:24 INFO]: Intave| ERROR: Vehicle entity not found in mount request: 41
```
a lot of times, and not only does it eats performance, but it also lags my browser when I'm in the console. Phoenix Crates is a pretty popular plugin too

**Environmental Information**
Environment: `26.1.1@775`,`Purpur@26.1.2-2583-dc46f46 (MC: 26.1.2)`,`5.5.0-SNAPSHOT-7482342`,`14.9.4-d78f4a2e`

title: Sometimes plugins can teleport players INSIDE BLOCKS, but intave doesnt care and says "Player is interacting suspisciously" making mining impossible and causing suffocation
author: minecraftforeva
body:
**Video description**
Having a video helps us immensely.
Please avoid streamable and enable "/intave verbose" during recording.

**Description of the bug**
severe bug:
Sometimes plugins can teleport players INSIDE BLOCKS, but intave doesnt care and says "Player is interacting suspisciously" making mining impossible and causing suffocation

**Environmental Information**
Output of `/intave diagnostics environment` (click the chat message to copy)
Environment: `1.21.11@774`,`Purpur@1.21.11-2568-f57bd86 (MC: 1.21.11)`,`5.4.1-SNAPSHOT`,`14.9.3+386abc41`

title: fix the spear's attack range when swapping items

title: Add Firework Simulation

Add speed and duration limits for fireworks

Many cheats have a SuperFirework feature that makes fireworks last longer and at a higher speed.

title: WaterSpeed Bypass
author: skr4tchh
body: Anti-cheat doesn't detect sprinting in water
